revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-305

Amplitude (of a symmetrical periodic quantity)

The maximum magnitude of a symmetrical periodic quantity within one period of the oscillation.


Note: 1 In German the term "amplitude" applies to the maximum instantaneous value of a sinusoidal oscillatory quantity. In the case of a non-sinusoidal quantity the term Scheitelwert is used.


Note: 2 Not to be confused with "Amplitude (of an observed heavenly body)" (1-2-125).


{{IALAFooter}}
